text:
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: IMMUNIZATIONS_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCDPD DataQ™ 
VALUES: 
31 = Site does not offer on-site immunization services 
32 = Site offers immunization services at select dates and times 
33 = Site offers immunization services without appointment during business hours 
Null/missing = This information has not been reported by the pharmacy 
COMMENT: 
This variable is new in 2012. This information is optional, and not required to be reported by 
pharmacies to
